= Link Macro Test Document

This document tests various link macro formats.

== HTTP/HTTPS Link Macros

URL link with macro: link:http://www.google.com[Google]
Broken URL for testing: link:http://www.yttftfftx.com[Broken Link]

== Local File Link Macros

Document link: link:../documents/manual.pdf[User Manual]
HTML with fragment: link:index.html#section1[Index Section]

== Mixed Content

Multiple on same line: link:http://www.google.com[First] and link:http://www.yttftfftx.com[Second] links.

== Direct URLs for Comparison

Direct URL: http://www.google.com
URL in parentheses: (http://www.yttftfftx.com)

== Invalid Protocols (Should be ignored)

FTP link: link:ftp://ftp.example.com[FTP Site]
IRC link: link:irc://irc.example.com[IRC Server]
Mailto link: link:mailto:test@example.com[Email]
